ideas.name: msa-engine
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: MSA-4B neural reranking service — loads model once as persistent daemon, receives candidate sets and rescore them through multi-scale attention for higher precision retrieval

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Reads memory entries from the database through the db client library for document prefill before neural reranking

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Receives dense vector embeddings from the Qwen3 embedding service as the initial retrieval stage before applying multi-scale attention rescoring
